title: Hibernation
effect: The target falls into hibernation, a coma-like sleep in which their metabolism slows to a crawl. They can go months with no additional food or water and with a fraction of the air they’d normally need. Loud sounds, damage, persistent prodding, and the like wakes someone in hibernation.
